case_title: REMMICH, MARVIN A. vs. PATETE, ANTONIO J. et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT PATETE, ANTONIO J. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATETE, ANTONIO J. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 955 PINE ST, #33 $1,248.40 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,248.40, STAYED UNTIL MAR-28-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS TO BE GRANTED BY COURT; (SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAIL); JUDGMENT MAILED TO 955 PINE ST, #32 - AS PER ADDRESS IN REGISTER ACTION GIVEN FOR DEFT'S - JUDGMENT & COMPLAINT LIST #33.
